LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-27-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CHANDRA SWENSON'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO PRIVATE ATTORNEYS GENERAL ACT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO PRIVATE ATTORNEY GENERALS ACT" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Settlement Pursuant To Private Attorneys General Act; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CHANDRA SWENSON's Motion To Approve Settlement Pursuant To Private Attorneys General Act.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve settlement pursuant to private attorney generals act" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
